flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at University of Colorado Boulder rose 25% between 2021 and 2024 ($12.5k → $15.7k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at University of Colorado Boulder rose 17% between 2021 and 2024 ($38.3k → $44.9k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at University of Colorado Boulder fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.1% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Public bachelor's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at University of Colorado Boulder are 30% above the public bachelor's-predominant peer median ($69.7k vs $53.4k).
